user.title: Set up Jarvis Cards Updater
user.description: Enter your JustSmart/Jarvis license key. The updater only downloads licensed Jarvis Cards releases from updates.justsmart.at.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Jarvis update server.
error.invalid_license: The license key is invalid, inactive, or expired.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: Jarvis Cards Updater is already configured.
